subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This is a handmaiden among Thy handmaidens who hath yearned for the ocean of Thy bounty and the horizon of Thy good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب هذه امة من امائک التی ارادت بحر فضلک و افق رضائک
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
